channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Running / Cycling Clubs venues
channel.description: Latest running / cycling clubs venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Pattaya Monkey Hash House Harriers
item.description: Pattaya hash variation. Runs every 2nd, odd-numbered month, usually 3rd Saturday. ~2.5h duration.

item.title: Khao Chi Chan (Buddha Mountain) — Walking & Meditation
item.description: FREE public walking + meditation site. Worlds largest cliff Buddha image (109m × 70m, 24-carat gold). 1995-96 royal Jubilee commission. Landscaped gardens.

item.title: Pattaya Beach Public Aerobics — Open-Air Free Fitness
item.description: FREE open-air group fitness on Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach boardwalks. Daily Zumba aerobics, dance fitness, yoga, tai chi, stretching. No fee, no signup. Genuine Thai cultural fitness phenomenon. Pattaya most underrated daily wellness routine.

item.title: Big Buddha Hill (Wat Phra Yai) — Pratamnak Landmark
item.description: Pattaya iconic 18m golden Buddha at peak of Pratamnak Hill. Free entry. Accessed via 100+ step grand staircase (genuine cardio climb). 360 degree panoramic Pattaya Bay + Jomtien views. Sunrise/sunset photography. Active temple with resident monks. Dress code applies.

item.title: Pattaya Archery Club
item.description: Non-profit archery club founded 2006. Beginner to expert. On-site bungalow accommodation, pool, tennis court, fishing boat. Affordable patient coaching.

item.title: Pattaya Cricket Club
item.description: Established 2010. Only Pattaya cricket club competing in Bangkok Cricket League. 3 teams: Stallions (1st XI), Thoroughbreds (over-45), Juniors. Nov-June season.

item.title: Megabreak Pool Hall Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya’s most respected dedicated pool hall. Tournament-class 9-foot pool tables + snooker. Long-running expat institution on Soi Diana, central Pattaya. ฿200–฿400/hour walk-in.

item.title: Bangkok Hospital Pattaya — Sports Rehabilitation & Wellness
item.description: BDMS-network JCI-accredited international hospital. Rehabilitation Center for sports/orthopedic/neuro injuries. Prestige Wellness Anti-Aging Center with DNA fitness profiling and weight management. Medical anchor for Pattaya sport tourism.

item.title: Pattaya Floating Market — Muay Talay & Cultural Activities
item.description: Cultural-sport park on canals across 4 Thai regional zones. Live Muay Talay (water boxing on tree-trunk over canal) shows 3x daily. Rowboats, amphibious boats, water zipline, Thai dance. Distinctive Pattaya cultural-sport experience.

item.title: Sanctuary of Truth — Wood Temple & Cultural-Sport Park
item.description: Pattaya iconic 105m all-teak wood temple, hand-carved without nails since 1981, still under active construction. On-site activities: horseback riding, speed boat tours, traditional Thai water-skill performance, walking grounds. Naklua peninsula setting.

item.title: Pattaya Hash House Harriers
item.description: First Pattaya hash, mixed running club since 1984. World's largest weekly running club. 'Drinking club with a running problem'.

item.title: Pattaya Bowl
item.description: North Pattaya ten-pin bowling alley. Late-night hours to 02:00. Family + group friendly.

item.title: Pattaya Cycling Clubs
item.description: Multiple road and MTB clubs. Cuore Masters Team + Monkey Xtreme + Jomtien Cycling + Pattaya MTB. Free to ฿2,000/year.

item.title: Pattaya Sai 3 Petanque Club
item.description: French-influenced petanque community. Central Pattaya Soi 3. All ages, drop-in friendly.

item.title: Jomtien Beach Volleyball
item.description: Pattaya beach volleyball community. Multiple Jomtien courts. Free pickup play. Mixed Thai-international.

item.title: Pattaya Lawn Bowls Clubs
item.description: Three lawn bowls facilities. 14+ artificial rinks total. Banchang ฿250/day all-inclusive. Pattaya Sports Club League runs year-round.

item.title: Pattaya Marathon (Amazing Thailand)
item.description: Pattaya flagship annual road race since 1992. World Athletics International Standard. Fun Run / 10K / 21K / 42K. 15,000+ runners. Boston Qualifying valid.

item.title: Pattaya Triathlon (Thailand Tri-League)
item.description: Most popular triathlon in Thailand. Thailand Tri-League series with Bangsaen + Pattaya + Sattahip. 1,500+ triathletes. Iconic Pattaya Hill run finish.

item.title: Nong Nooch Tropical Garden — Cultural & Muay Thai Show
item.description: Southeast Asia largest botanical garden (600 acres). Daily 90-min cultural show: Thai dance + Muay Thai demo + sword fighting + elephant show.

item.title: Pattaya Public Running Routes & Parks
item.description: Free public running guide. Pattaya Beach 5.8km, Jomtien Beach, Mabprachan 4km loop, Pratumnak Park, Nongprue 1km, Chaiyapruek 400m track.

item.title: Pattaya Panthers Rugby Football Club
item.description: Pattaya only rugby club. Contact + touch rugby formats. Annual Pattaya Tens tournament in May with international touring teams. Beginner-friendly.

item.title: SF Strike Bowl Pattaya (Central Festival)
item.description: Modern mall-attached bowling — 16 regular + 2 VIP lanes (separate partitioned space). Pool tables + sea-view smoking lounge + arcade. SF Group operator. 180 baht/game.
